<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [WEDOS](https://www.wedos.com) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/wedos/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "wedos"
  dnsCredentials:
    # WEDOS_USERNAME: Username is the same as for the admin account
    username: ""
    # WEDOS_WAPI_PASSWORD: Password needs to be generated and IP allowed in the admin interface
    wapiPassword: ""
    # WEDOS_HTTP_TIMEOUT: API request timeout in seconds (Default: 30)
    httpTimeout: ""
    # WEDOS_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 10)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # WEDOS_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 600)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # WEDOS_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 300)
    ttl: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
